name: Caribbean Fish Chowder
recipeInstructions:
Salt and pepper to taste.
Heat the oil in a large soup pot. Sauté the onion and garlic until the onions are translucent. Add all of the other ingredients except the shrimp, clams, and fish. Simmer for 1 hour or until the vegetables are tender. Add the seafood and cook for 7 to 10 minutes at a low boil.
NOTE: I have occasionally added 1/4 cup rice to this recipe and it is good that way too.
Serves 8 to 10.
